CustomField.formula: IF(LEN(Account__r.BillingStreet)>0, Account__r.BillingStreet & " " , "" ) & BR() & IF(LEN(Account__r.BillingCity)>0, Account__r.BillingCity & ", " , "" )& IF(LEN(Account__r.BillingState)>0, Account__r.BillingState & " " , "" )& IF(LEN(Account__r.BillingPostalCode)>0, Account__r.BillingPostalCode,"") & BR() & IF(LEN(Account__r.BillingCountry) >0, Account__r.BillingCountry,"")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Make sure that the address is fully updated
CustomField.label: Contracting Address
